## Epic: Data Pipeline

- [ ] [SETUP] Provision data sources and staging infrastructure
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#SETUP

- [ ] Implement scheduled data ingestion from configured sources [GATE]
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#AC-1

- [ ] Build data transformation pipeline with cleaning and normalization
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#AC-2

- [ ] Add data quality validation checks and anomaly detection
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#AC-3

- [ ] Create data export jobs to warehouse and API endpoints
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#AC-4

- [ ] Implement pipeline monitoring dashboard and alerting
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#AC-5

- [ ] [VERIFY] Run end-to-end pipeline with sample data and validate outputs
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#VERIFY

- [ ] [E2E] Execute full pipeline integration test from ingestion to monitoring
  source: stories/data-pipeline.md#E2E
